title: elytrigia intermedia subsp. pulcherrima
intro: Elytrigia intermedia subsp. pulcherrima, also known as red fescue, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues and inflammation, due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Elytrigia intermedia subsp. pulcherrima include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties, although further research is necessary to confirm its effectiveness.
